reason: The Executive worker-thread pair now has a clean baseline export, a bounded boot-time ETL extract that proves early Session Manager\Executive activity from System (PID 4), a successful Procmon boot-log lane with zero exact-value hits, a shell-safe post-boot stress trigger lane with zero exact-value hits, and current-build ntoskrnl string hits plus Ghidra fallback artifacts for both values. That gives the lane credible cross-layer evidence, but the semantics still depend on unresolved current-build code blocks, the exact worker-thread pair still does not appear in runtime payloads, and there is no shipped RegProbe mapping.
